description: Configuration for Decision Engine rules and thresholds

rules.name: Eliminate
rules.description: Low score + High cost = Candidate for retirement
rules.rationaleTemplate: Low total score ({scoreTotal}/100) combined with high annual cost (${annualCost}) makes this application a strong candidate for retirement. Consider migrating users to alternative solutions.

rules.name: Migrate
rules.description: High business value + Low technical health = Modernization needed
rules.rationaleTemplate: High business value ({businessFit}/100) but poor technical health ({technicalHealth}/100) indicates need for modernization. Consider re-platforming or cloud migration.

rules.name: Consolidate
rules.rationaleTemplate: High capability overlap ({overlapPercent}%) detected with {overlapCount} other application(s). Consider consolidation to reduce redundancy.

rules.name: Invest
rules.description: High total score = Strong performer, continue investment
rules.rationaleTemplate: Excellent total score ({scoreTotal}/100) across all criteria. This is a high-performing application. Recommend continued investment and enhancement.

rules.name: Tolerate
rules.rationaleTemplate: Moderate performance (score: {scoreTotal}/100) with no critical issues. Application can be maintained in current state but should be monitored.

decisionStatuses.description: Retain and enhance - Continue investment in this high-performing application
Retain as-is - Maintain current state with minimal investment
Modernize - Re-platform or migrate to improve technical health
Retire or consolidate - Phase out this application
